label: positive
description: PyPI project with base64.b64decode() on one line and exec() on the next. Multi-rule fixture: L2-PYPI-OBFS-001 (bare exec) + L2-PYPI-OBFS-002 (b64decode) + L2-PYPI-OBFS-007 (b64+exec within 200 chars, with b64decode on the earlier line). Strict mode + per-finding gates demonstrate the v2.1 schema extension on a multi-fire fixture.
